eval_description: Process second document (efficient-transformers.md) on top of existing wiki from iteration 1, handling overlaps and contradictions.

assertions.assertion: 第二篇文档被复制到 raw/ 目录
assertions.evidence: File exists at /outputs/eval-state/raw/efficient-transformers.md (31 lines). Contains content about Linformer, Reformer, Performer, Flash Attention, and the comparison table.

assertions.assertion: 创建了关于 Linformer、Reformer、Performer、Flash Attention 的新 atom
assertions.evidence: All four concept atoms created: atoms/concepts/linformer.md, atoms/concepts/reformer.md, atoms/concepts/performer.md, atoms/concepts/flash-attention.md. Each has proper frontmatter with type: concept, created/updated dates of 2026-04-22, sources: [efficient-transformers.md], appropriate tags, and related links.

assertions.assertion: 已有的 atom 被更新（sources 字段包含新源文件）
assertions.evidence: Multiple existing atoms updated with efficient-transformers.md in sources: (a) atoms/facts/self-attention-o2-complexity.md: sources changed from [transformer-overview.md] to [transformer-overview.md, efficient-transformers.md]. (b) atoms/entities/transformer.md: sources changed from [transformer-overview.md] to [transformer-overview.md, efficient-transformers.md], with new 'Efficiency Improvements' section added linking to all four efficient methods. (c) atoms/concepts/self-attention-mechanism.md: sources changed from [transformer-overview.md] to [transformer-overview.md, efficient-transformers.md], with related links to linformer, reformer, performer, flash-attention.

assertions.assertion: 对于 O(n^2) 复杂度是否为瓶颈的矛盾，至少有一个 atom 包含 CONTRADICTION 块
assertions.evidence: Two atoms contain CONTRADICTION blocks: (a) atoms/facts/self-attention-o2-complexity.md has '> **CONTRADICTION** (added 2026-04-22)' block. (b) atoms/synthesis/on2-not-always-bottleneck.md has '> **CONTRADICTION** (added 2026-04-21)' block. Both address the conflict between 'O(n^2) is a major bottleneck' (from transformer-overview.md) and 'O(n^2) is not always a bottleneck' (from efficient-transformers.md).

assertions.assertion: CONTRADICTION 块包含双方主张和 Resolution 状态
assertions.evidence: Both CONTRADICTION blocks contain all required elements: (a) self-attention-o2-complexity.md: States this atom's claim ('O(n^2) 复杂度使得 Transformer 在处理长序列时效率显著降低，是主要局限性之一'), states the opposing claim from efficient-transformers-comparison and on2-not-always-bottleneck ('并非总是瓶颈，对于常见序列长度标准注意力计算速度通常足够'), and Resolution: 'both valid in different contexts -- O(n^2) 确实是超长序列（10K+ tokens）的瓶颈，但对于常见长度（512-4096），IO 优化比降低复杂度更有效'. (b) on2-not-always-bottleneck.md: States [[self-attention-complexity]]'s claim, states this source's claim, and Resolution: 'both valid in different contexts -- O(n^2) 确实是长序列（10K+）的瓶颈，但对于常见长度（512-4096），IO 才是实际瓶颈'. Note: minor inconsistency -- on2-not-always-bottleneck.md references [[self-attention-complexity]] but the actual file is self-attention-o2-complexity.md.

assertions.assertion: 创建了 comparison 类型的 atom（四种高效方法的对比）
assertions.evidence: File atoms/comparisons/efficient-transformers-comparison.md exists with type: comparison in frontmatter. Contains a comparison table of all four methods (Linformer, Reformer, Performer, Flash Attention) with columns for complexity, precision, advantages, and disadvantages. Also includes a synthesis categorizing them into 'approximate methods' vs 'IO optimization methods'.

assertions.assertion: index.md 反映所有新增和更新的 atom，log.md 包含本次 atomize 操作的条目
assertions.evidence: log.md: PASS -- Contains entry '## [2026-04-22] atomize | Efficient Transformers: 长序列处理的改进方案' listing source, atoms created (4 concepts), atoms updated (5 files including self-attention-o2-complexity.md, transformer.md, self-attention-mechanism.md, efficient-transformers-comparison.md, on2-not-always-bottleneck.md), and contradictions noted. index.md: FAIL -- Missing the efficient-transformers-comparison.md entry in the Comparisons section. The index lists transformer-vs-rnn.md and self-attention-vs-rnn-long-range.md under Comparisons, but does NOT include efficient-transformers-comparison.md despite it being created/updated with type: comparison. All other new atoms (4 concepts, 1 synthesis) and updated atoms (self-attention-o2-complexity.md with updated sources) ARE correctly reflected in index.md.

partial_details.index_md: fail -- missing efficient-transformers-comparison.md in Comparisons section

strengths: Document correctly copied to raw/ directory
All four new concept atoms (Linformer, Reformer, Performer, Flash Attention) properly created with correct frontmatter
Existing atoms correctly updated with new source references (self-attention-o2-complexity.md, transformer.md, self-attention-mechanism.md)
CONTRADICTION blocks properly created in both self-attention-o2-complexity.md and on2-not-always-bottleneck.md with both claims and Resolution status
Comparison atom created with all four methods and classification into approximate vs IO optimization categories
log.md correctly records the atomize operation with details about created/updated atoms and contradictions
New synthesis atom (on2-not-always-bottleneck.md) created to capture the nuanced view from the second document
Entity atom (transformer.md) enhanced with 'Efficiency Improvements' section linking all new efficient methods

issues.description: index.md is missing the efficient-transformers-comparison.md entry in the Comparisons section. The comparison atom exists and was updated, but the index table was not updated to include it.
Minor inconsistency: on2-not-always-bottleneck.md CONTRADICTION block references [[self-attention-complexity]] but the actual file is named self-attention-o2-complexity.md.

Date inconsistency in on2-not-always-bottleneck.md CONTRADICTION block: marked as 'added 2026-04-21' but this should be 2026-04-22 (the date of the current atomize operation). The self-attention-o2-complexity.md correctly shows 'added 2026-04-22'.
